title: 2026 04 11 HackerNews
content: The HackerNews discussion covers six main topics: 1) The EFF is leaving X because influence has dropped and platform governance has regressed, raising questions about its political bias. 2) France’s government plans to migrate some desktops from Windows to Linux to boost digital sovereignty, despite cost and compatibility hurdles. 3) An open‑source “InstantSpaceSwitcher” tool lets macOS users switch virtual desktops instantly, addressing sluggish animation on new high‑refresh displays. 4) “1‑D Chess” proposes a line‑based chess variant that is discussed for its strategic depth. 5) FBI recovered deleted Signal messages via iPhone notification data, exposing weaknesses in end‑to‑end encryption. 6) A low‑cost “CoLaptop” service turns old laptops into cloud servers, offering 99.9 % uptime for around €7/month.
eventKey: 2026-hackernews
normalizedTitle: 2026 04 11 hackernews

title: 传梁文锋内部发声，DeepSeek V4 将于 4 月下旬发布
content: DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng announced that the next flagship model, DeepSeek V4, will launch in late April. The new model is expected to have trillion‑parameter scale and a million‑token context window, and will be optimized for domestic chips such as Huawei’s Ascend. In anticipation, major Chinese AI firms—Alibaba, ByteDance, Tencent—have ordered hundreds of thousands of new AI‑compute chips, driving recent price increases of about 20 %. DeepSeek has not yet responded to inquiries.

title: SBTI 走红网络 作者：初衷是为了劝朋友戒酒
content: The SBTI AI personality test gained online popularity for its absurd “abstract tags” and deconstructive style, positioning itself against MBTI. It uses self‑ironic labels instead of rigorous psychological categories to appeal to internet subculture aesthetics. Developed without a psychology background, the creators emphasize the tool is for entertainment, not scientific assessment, and discourage commercial use. The original purpose was to persuade a friend to quit drinking, and the explanations of traits are intentionally vague or inaccurate.

title: OpenAI 创始人奥尔特曼住所遭人用燃烧瓶袭击
content: A 20‑year‑old suspect was arrested by San Francisco police after allegedly throwing a bomb at the home of OpenAI founder and CEO Sam Altman and making threats outside the company’s headquarters. No injuries were reported. OpenAI thanked law enforcement and the city for their swift response and said it is assisting the investigation. Altman has not issued a statement. The police first investigated a fire at a North Beach residence, then apprehended the suspect at 1400 Third Street.

title: AI 写作年赚 200 万夫妻被封号
content: A couple who claimed to earn 2 million yuan a year from an AI‑generated WeChat public account had their account shut down. The platform flagged the account for non‑human automated content creation and disabled the account and its mini‑program on April 1. Most of the purported income came from a 299‑yuan deposit fee. WeChat recently added a rule banning automated writing, and the couple’s case demonstrates the enforcement of this policy across self‑media.

title: 追觅俞浩内部发言曝光：扬言年薪 2 亿招首席科学家，把宇树所有客户、标的抢过来
content: A CEO of ZuiMi Technology, Yu Hao, was filmed in an internal message allegedly directing his team to aggressively target competitors. He demanded a controversial strategy: offering a 200‑million‑yuan yearly salary to lure top scientists, seizing rival clients, bids, and staff, while ordering full‑scale public‑relations pressure against the competitor. The exchange, linked to a subsidiary, sparked debate about the escalating competition and high salaries in the smart‑manufacturing and robotics sectors. The company has not confirmed the authenticity of the screenshots.

title: 京东被曝内测 Open 出行新业务，App 端高度对标主流打车应用
content: Jingdong is testing a new “Open Departure Service” in Jinan, designed to match mainstream ride‑hailing apps. The platform, partnered with Changan, may shift Jingdong away from its usual aggregator model toward a “e‑commerce + auto manufacturer” mobility approach. Previously Jingdong’s search offered a “taxi” option that linked to the “Easy Enterprise Travel” mini‑app, providing several ride‑hailing services before its removal. The new service is currently in a limited rollout.

title: 苹果将关闭美国首家成立工会的零售店
content: Apple has permanently closed three retail stores: in Towson, Maryland; Tumblebrook (Connecticut); and the North County Shopping Center near San Diego. The Towson location will close in June with no replacement, citing multiple retailer exits and declining performance at the mall. Employees were notified abruptly; some had expected union representation to provide job security. While they may apply for other Apple positions, they will not be reassigned to nearby stores, and Apple says it will evaluate remaining stores to meet customer needs.
eventKey: 苹果将关闭美国首家成立工会的零售店

title: 再也读不进书了？神经科学提供了一套解决方案
content: Many people find it hard to read a whole book, a trend that neuroscience links to declining deep‑reading habits. Research shows fast, distracted eye movements reduce time for complex understanding, weakening critical thinking and brain circuits that support long‑term retention. However, basic strategies can reverse this: remind yourself of the brain benefits, deliberately slow down, start with shorter texts, break readings into daily segments, and read with a partner. Re‑engaging with complete books restores neural pathways and enhances focused comprehension.
eventKey: 再也读不进书了-神经科学提供了一套解决方案
normalizedTitle: 再也读不进书了 神经科学提供了一套解决方案

title: 从万倍收益到百亿私募：王文价值投资体系的深度解构与实践指南
content:
第一章： 投资哲学——以“实业思维”做股东

王文的投资哲学根植于一个朴素而强大的理念：将股票视为企业所有权的凭证，而非交易筹码。这一“实业思维”贯穿其所有决策，衍生出两大基石与五大具体原则。

1.1 两大核心基石：“便宜”与“成长”的动态统一

其思想总纲可概括为“便宜是硬道理，成长是真功夫”。这并非割裂的二元论，而是要求以“便宜”（高安全边际）的价格，买入具备“真成长”（内在价值持续增长）潜力的企业。

“便宜”的深度定义：王文眼中的“便宜”绝非简单的低市盈率（PE）。他构建了“两高一低”的立体筛选标准：

高现金流：企业经营造血能力的核心试金石…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 鑫鑫-投资

title: 开源中国完成 C+ 轮融资，冲刺“开源AI第一股”
content: 4月10日，开源中国宣布完成数亿元C+轮融资，由上海国投先导基金领投，中国互联网投资基金、君联资本、联想创投、苏创投及贝克资本联合跟投。截至目前，开源中国累计融资规模已接近20亿元。 开源中国于2008年8月创立，是国内核心开源与AI基础设施服务商，目前团队超300人，总部在北京市，同时在深圳、广州、郑州设立了研发中心。开源中国经过18年的发展和积累，不仅创立了国内最大、最专业的开源技术社区OSCHINA.NET和全球第二大代码托管与协作平台Gitee，同时也研发了Gitee系列研发运营一体化平台，专注服务金融、军工和央企等国民经济关键领域…

title: 🔥 SolonCode CLI v2026.4.11 发布（编码智能体）
content:
1、关于 SolonCode CLI（编程终端智能体） SolonCode CLI 是基于 Java + Solon AI 开发的 “编程终端智能体”。

常见问题：它和 Claude Code 有什么不同？

功能上很相似，关键差异：

采用 Java 实现，100% 开源。
使用 “全中文” 提示词构建（英文不好的人，会很亲切）。
不绑定特定提供商。需要配置模型。模型迭代会缩小差异、降低成本，因此保持 provider-agnostic 很重要。
聚焦终端命令行界面 (CLI)，通过系统命令运行。
支持 Web，ACP 协议进行远程通讯。…

title: DataFlow - 以数据为中心的 AI 系统
content: DataFlow 是一个高效完成高质量数据治理的系统，旨在对诸如 PDF 文档、纯文本、爬虫数据等低质量而嘈杂的数据进行 修正、扩增、评估与过滤（refine, generate, evaluate, filt） 以得到高质量的训练数据。这些数据可以通过预训练、有监督微调、强化学习训练提升大语言模型在通用领域（推理能力和检索能力）与特定领域（如医疗、金融、法律等）的性能。此外，Dataflow产出的高质量数据也可以有效赋能现有的RAG系统。
eventKey: dataflow-以数据为中心的
normalizedTitle: dataflow - 以数据为中心的 ai 系统

title: 凝聚开源共识 共绘技术蓝图｜openKylin技术委员会4月会议顺利召开
content: 4月9日上午，OpenAtom openKylin（以下简称“openKylin”）技术委员会会议在北京召开。来自麒麟软件、联想开天、海光信息、国防科大、国家工业信息安全发展研究中心、海河实验室、清华大学、沐曦、飞腾、中科通量、苦芽科技、技德等单位的代表参会，围绕社区治理、版本规划、技术演进等议题展开交流。 会议伊始，麒麟软件有限公司党委副书记、总经理孔金珠发表开场致辞。他对openKylin 技术委员会过去的工作表示肯定，并对未来前沿技术方向提出殷切期望，希望社区持续加强生态协同，打造全球领先的智能操作系统开源根社区，预祝本次会议取得圆满成功。…

title: 产研融合启新篇：openKylin协办中国电子学会计算机分会学术活动&4・10会员日活动
content:
4月9日，以“链接产研、智启未来”为主题的计算机分会学术活动暨中国电子学会“4・10会员日” 活动，在北京师范大学昌平校区顺利举行。本次活动由中国电子学会计算机分会主办，北京师范大学人工智能学院承办，OpenAtom openKylin（简称“openKylin”）社区协办。 北京师范大学人工智能学院院长、中国电子学会计算机分会副主任黄华为会议致辞，多位行业专家带来重磅主题报告，院校师生代表齐聚共话技术创新与产业发展。

title: AI，最终幻想
content:
距离当前服务器 500 公里外，某处废墟里有一块 1980 年代德国产的精密钢片，因特定的晶体结构和氧化程度，能发出最纯净的中音 C。  

ClaudeDot，一个挂在 macOS 菜单栏里的小圆点，当 Claude Code 在终端里默默运行时，这个小点会在菜单栏里呼吸，蓝色是等待，紫色是思考，黄色是工具调用中。除了颜色，它还配有音效，需要人工确认时会“叮”一声，任务完成时会“啪”一下。

https://github.com/poorfish/ClaudeDot

这是朋友最新的作品，纯 Claude Code 产物。在聊这个工具的时候…
source: 开源中国-全部 - 菠萝的海子
eventKey: 最终幻想
normalizedTitle: ai 最终幻想
representativeSources: 开源中国-全部 - 菠萝的海子

title: PHP 8.5.5 发布
content:
PHP 8.5.5 现已发布，这是一个漏洞修复版本。建议所有 PHP 8.5 用户升级到此版本。 Core：
修复了错误 GH-20672（局部 shadowed 特征属性的 property_info 大小不正确）。
修复了错误 GH-20875、GH-20873、GH-20854（在 get_property_ptr_ptr 中为 lazy 代理传播 IN_GET 保护）。
Bz2：
修复总输出大小截断导致的错误。
DOM：
修复了错误 GH-21486（Dom\HTMLDocument 解析器会破坏 xml:space 和…
source: 开源中国-全部 - 白开水不加糖
eventKey: php
normalizedTitle: php 8 5 5 发布

content:
4月10日，由鲸鸿动能、华为应用市场（AppGallery）及Push用户增长服务联合发起的“鸿蒙生态用户增长臻享会·长沙站”圆满落幕。本次活动聚焦金融理财、实用工具及商务应用三大行业，吸引了众多营销负责人、开发者及生态伙伴到场，鲸鸿动能作为鸿蒙生态的全场景智慧营销平台，携手华为应用市场与Push服务，共同向行业展示了如何基于生态数据与场景能力，从海量流量中识别真实用户，构建可持续的商业增长闭环。 深耕鸿蒙沃土，打造品牌增长“价值源泉”

This strategy shows that economic influence can serve as a power tool for countries outside the traditional superpower sphere.

title: 2026.04 最新 Claude Code 安装过程记录
content: The author records a 2026 installation of Claude Code in China, noting the need for a VPN (Singapore node works), a CLI check, and the difficulty of logging into Claude due to regional restrictions. They switch the default Claude model to the domestic Mini Max API by registering, obtaining an API key, and using the cc-switch tool. A configuration flag bypasses onboarding. They then create a simple Next.js todo‑list project, observe some performance differences with different VPN nodes, and integrate Claude Code into VS Code with the Mini Max model. The Mini Max cost for the demo is about 0.7 CNY.
source: 掘金本周最热 - 双越AI_club
eventKey: 2026-claude-code-安装过程记录
